entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in June 2019. In May 2021 the exchange stated that its CFO and administrator had disappeared with access to user wallets after customers reported blocked withdrawals, and the venue did not return to normal operation.
entity.notes: HEI uses the exchange's May 5, 2021 statement as the terminal date. The statement attributed loss of wallet access to the disappearance of the CFO and administrator; contemporaneous customer reports documented blocked withdrawals. Because the venue ceased meaningful operation and user assets became inaccessible under an insider-disappearance scenario, the record uses dead / scam_rug.

events.title: ATOMARS launched
events.description: ATOMARS began operating as a Seychelles-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: CoinMarketCap preserves the exact launch date; archived first-party material identifies the same exchange and service domain.

events.title: ATOMARS reported loss of wallet access after administrator disappearance
events.description: ATOMARS stated that its CFO and exchange administrator had disappeared with access to user wallets while customers reported blocked withdrawals and unresponsive support.
events.notes: The exchange's own statement was preserved by contemporary reporting. No reliable evidence of restored exchange operation was found.

evidence.title: ATOMARS exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile records a launch date of June 12, 2019 and a Seychelles base.

evidence.title: ATOMARS original exchange website
evidence.notes: Archived first-party domain preserves the exchange identity and service history.

evidence.title: The CFO and administrator of exchange has disappeared
evidence.notes: First-party statement reported that the CFO and administrator had disappeared with access to exchange wallets.

evidence.title: Cryptocurrency exchange Atomars executive disappears with users money
evidence.notes: Contemporary report reproduces the exchange statement and documents blocked withdrawals and unresponsive support.

evidence.title: Atomars manager disappears with wallet access
evidence.notes: Independent contemporary coverage corroborates the May 5 statement and loss of wallet access.
